---
name: Bug report
about: Create a bug report to help us improve DAQIRI
title: "[BUG]"
labels: "? - Needs Triage, bug"
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**Steps/Code to reproduce bug**
Follow this guide http://matthewrocklin.com/blog/work/2018/02/28/minimal-bug-reports to craft a minimal bug report. This helps us reproduce the issue you're having and resolve the issue more quickly.

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Environment overview (please complete the following information)**
 - Environment location: [Bare-metal, Docker]
 - Method of DAQIRI install: [Docker, source]
   - If method of install is [Docker], provide `docker pull` & `docker run` commands used

**Environment details**
Please provide relevant environment details such as:
 - OS and version:
 - Python version:
 - DAQIRI version:
 - Hardware configuration (e.g. DGX Spark, IGX, x86 + dGPU):
 - Any other relevant package versions:

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
